personas.name: News Curator
personas.description: Creator of content. Gathers news, assigns avatars, and generates AI-led video briefings. Can fetch news for each genre, assign one teacher avatar per genre, generate narration scripts, trigger AI video generation, manage video storage, monitor generation status, and refresh content every 2 hours.

personas.name: News User (Reactor)
personas.description: The user interacting with the system. Watches the news briefing presynthesized for the 2-hour cycle. Can access the latest news video set, automatically assigned a conv_id, and view the 5-genre video playlist during the current 2-hour cycle.

flows.flow_name: Generate News Videos (Triggered by First User in a 2-Hour Window)
actions: Detect User Entry
Check for Active 2-Hour Window
Fetch News Content Dynamically (One Per Genre) using Google Search queries
Access Teacher Avatars using the API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id=%7B16767%7D and assign a unique avatar to each genre.
Generate Narration Scripts
Generate Videos
Store Videos Under Source conv_id
Save Metadata
flows.sub_goal: Create 5 genre-specific AI videos using teacher avatars and store them under the first user’s conv_id for 2 hours.

flows.flow_name: Deliver Videos to Any User Accessing Within 2-Hour Window
actions: When any user accesses the NEWS Agent, a new conv_id is auto-created for that session.
The system does NOT generate new videos for this user.
Instead, it retrieves the latest conv_id that is marked ready and belongs to the first user who accessed News Agent in this 2-hour block.
Fetch all 5 genre videos for presentation.
All users within this 2-hour period receive the same exact video set.
flows.sub_goal: Retrieve and serve the same video set to all users using the conv_id of the first user in the current 2-hour cycle.

flows.flow_name: Deliver and Loop Pre-Synthesized News Videos (Triggered on User Access)
actions: When a user opens the NEWS agent, a new conv_id is automatically created for their session.
The system does NOT generate new videos for this user.
It retrieves the source conv_id generated by the first user in the current 2-hour block and marked as 'ready'.
Fetch 5 pre-synthesized genre videos (Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Weather).
Play videos in sequence, narrated by unique avatars.
After the 5th video completes, loop back to the first video indefinitely until the 2-hour session ends.
Trigger a new content cycle once 2 hours pass.
flows.sub_goal: Deliver and loop the same 5-genre video briefing to all users in the 2-hour window.
